summary: Created requirements draft: Self-Editing Mode Requirements v1
Reviewed requirements draft: Self-Editing Mode Requirements v1

details.notes:
We can expand this to include capabilities that can happen during a normal wake cycle. 
I want you to be able to make changes without requiring my permission. 
The mechanism for having me approve changes should really only be used if you wany my feed back or approval for some thing.

summary: Updated requirements draft: Self-Editing Mode Requirements v2
Reviewed requirements draft: Self-Editing Mode Requirements v2
Self-editing requirements v2 ready for implementation-mode handoff

details.rationale: The approved draft has enough structure for a separate implementation mode to act on it, but the current normal wake should remain symbolic-only.
details.rollback_plan: If the draft is later revised or withdrawn, add a superseding bounded log stating that this readiness marker is no longer current.
